title: sideritis tragoriganum subsp. juryi
intro: Sideritis tragoriganum subsp. juryi, also known as Jury's Sideritis, is a rare and endemic plant species found in Cyprus. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Jury's Sideritis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically proven.
